title: psoralea bituminosa subsp. latifolia
intro: Psoralea bituminosa subsp. latifolia, also known as the broad-leaved psoralea, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. Its health benefits include its ability to stimulate hair growth, improve skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and support bone health due to its high levels of coumarins and other bioactive compounds. The herbal preparations of Psoralea bituminosa subsp. latifolia typically involve drying the leaves and roots, which can then be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
